=== preview ===

        0_requires_0["A"]
      end
      style 0_requires stroke:none

        0_provides_0["A"]
      end
      style 0_provides stroke:none
    end
    style 0_wrap fill:transparent
    style 0_wrap stroke:none
  end
  style 0 fill:transparent
